title: damnacanthus major var. macrophyllus
intro: Damnacanthus major var. macrophyllus, also known as Large-leafed Damnacanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make infusions, teas, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
